name: pf-finance
description: Personal Finance MCP Server — query and manage financial data via your AI assistant. Ask about spending, budgets, net worth, goals, and investments using natural language.

accounts.description: Read account balances, account list, and net worth snapshots

budgets.description: View budget usage and set budget limits by category

spending.description: Analyze spending trends, anomalies, and category breakdowns

goals.description: Track savings goals and their progress toward target amounts

investments.description: View portfolio holdings, performance, and net worth over time

categories.description: List transaction categories and manage auto-categorization rules

subscriptions.description: View detected recurring subscriptions and their costs

loans.description: View outstanding loans, balances, and payoff schedules

insights.description: Dashboard spotlight items, weekly recap, and financial health score

example_prompts: How much did I spend last month by category?
Am I on track with my budgets this month?
Show me my top 5 spending categories this year.
Are there any unusual transactions I should review?
How long until I reach my emergency fund goal?
What subscriptions am I paying for each month?
Add a $50 grocery transaction for today.

security.description: MCP server runs on the user's machine. All data stays local. No bank credentials. No third-party data sharing. Requires the app to be unlocked before tools are accessible.
security.authentication: App unlock (passphrase for self-hosted, session cookie for cloud)
security.scope: Read all financial data; write new transactions, budgets, goals, accounts, and snapshots
